Nadi Nusantara Berhad (Company No.: 202201234567 (9999999-Z)) — General Announcement pursuant to Main Market Listing Requirements paragraph 9.03 of Bursa Serantau Securities Berhad.
Subject: Update on attempted cyber intrusion; public follow-up to notice dated 15 April 2026.
The incident involved a blocked login spray against a non-production file server at Menara Nusantara, No. 88, Jalan Seruling 5, 59099 Kuala Lumpur.
For avoidance of doubt, operations continue uninterrupted and there is no material financial impact or change to previously disclosed guidance.
Review of the affected repository indicates only training and test artefacts with generic form labels such as “Name: _______”, “NRIC/Passport: _______”, “Phone: _______”.
Example placeholder strings observed include “NRIC: 770101-14-000X”, “Account: 123-456-7890123”, and “TIN: 12-3456-78-9012”, all invalid for any data subject.
One file contained a single MY passport identifier: HZ1234567 in a travel claim template; access logs show viewing but no download and the template did not include a person’s name.
No payroll files, customer databases, or vendor master with live bank account details were present; “Vendor Bank Acct: 000-000-0000000 (dummy)” was a test string.
The Company has notified the Board Risk Committee and reported the event to the Market Surveillance unit of Bursa Serantau and to the Suruhanjaya Pasaran Modal Nusantara for record only.
This announcement does not contain MNPI and is issued to maintain transparency under the company’s Cyber Incident Response SOP and the issuer disclosure policy.
Contact for queries: securityops@nadinusantara.com.my or the public helpline 1-300-88-4242; do not send personal documents to these channels.
Internal tracker references like “Employee TIN: XX-XXXX-XX-XXXX”, “Passport No.: [ENTER HERE]”, and “Tel: 03-XXXX XXXX” appear in the logs as blank templates.
The device names, IPs, and user roles observed (“QA-TEST-12”, “ops_reader”) are internal labels and do not identify individuals.
Remediation completed: password policy tightened, MFA enforced, and non-production repositories with sample ESG and HR forms have been archived.
